implementation_targets: Streamlit UI with 4 core states (need_specificity, need_context, need_purpose, completed)
State transition logic with 6 normal paths and 1 error path

file_plan.purpose: Main Streamlit application with UI components and state management
Question processing API endpoint with state transition logic
Centralized state transition rules and validation logic
Growth-oriented feedback message templates for each state

app_constraints: Mandatory session state variable: st.session_state.current_screen with values: 'awaiting_input', 'diagnosing', 'need_specificity', 'need_context', 'need_purpose', 'completed', 'error'
State transition paths: awaiting_input → diagnosing → (need_specificity/need_context/need_purpose) → completed
Error transition: completed → error on validation failure
State transition must be implemented as: st.session_state.current_screen = NEW_STATE
UI must render different components based on st.session_state.current_screen value
API must return JSON with 'current_screen' field for state tracking
Feedback messages must use growth-oriented language patterns
Each state must validate exactly one question element (specificity/context/purpose)
test_strategy: UI state transition test: Verify screen changes when question elements are missing
API state validation: Check /api/chat returns correct current_screen value
Error handling test: Simulate invalid state transitions to trigger error state
Feedback language audit: Verify all messages use growth-oriented expressions
Validation rule test: Confirm only one element is addressed per coaching cycle
End-to-end flow test: Complete full question refinement from awaiting_input to completed
